apiInfo.title: Policy Transactions API - SetUp Systematic Withdrawal & SetUp Systematic RMD
apiInfo.description: Single-file API spec for creating Systematic Withdrawal and Systematic RMD arrangements.

fieldInstances.description: Unique policy number (1–30 characters).
Identifier returned in the Location header from the POST.
Technical message with specific error details for developers identify the type of error quickly.
Server-assigned identifier for the withdrawal request.
Current status of the withdrawal request.

A structured error code that uniquely identifies the type of error. This can follow a hierarchical format:
- <domain>: The logical domain (e.g., "gateway")
- <category>: The error category (e.g., "client" or "server")
- <subcategory>: A specific error identifier (e.g., "badrequest", "timeout")

endpoints.description: Retrieve the withdrawal request resource created by POST.
endpoints.responseCodesAndMediaTypes: 200: application/json; 400: application/json; 401: application/json; 403: application/json; 404: application/json; 429: application/json; 500: application/json

endpoints.description: Create a new Systematic Required Minimum Distribution (RMD) arrangement.
endpoints.responseCodesAndMediaTypes: 201: application/json; 400: application/json; 401: application/json; 403: application/json; 404: application/json; 405: application/json; 406: application/json; 409: application/json; 413: application/json; 415: application/json; 422: application/json; 429: application/json; 500: application/json; 502: application/json; 503: application/json; 504: application/json

endpoints.description: Create a new Systematic Withdrawal arrangement.
endpoints.responseCodesAndMediaTypes: 201: application/json; 400: application/json; 401: application/json; 403: application/json; 404: application/json; 405: application/json; 406: application/json; 409: application/json; 413: application/json; 415: application/json; 422: application/json; 429: application/json; 500: application/json; 502: application/json; 503: application/json; 504: application/json

schemas.name: GetWithdrawalRequestStatus
schemas.description: Withdrawal request status resource created by the GET request.

schemas.name: Producer
schemas.description: Information about the producer submitting the request

schemas.name: rmdInfo
schemas.description: required minimum distribution (rmd) details for the systematic program

schemas.name: SystematicProgram
schemas.description:
Systematic program details for withdrawal or RMD setup.
The property `rmdInfo` is only relevant and required when `arrangementType` is `REQUIREDMINIMUMDISTRIBUTION`.

schemas.name: TaxWithholdingInstruction
schemas.description: List of tax withholding instruction entries

schemas.name: WithdrawalRequestStatus
schemas.description: Withdrawal request status resource created by the POST.
